_comment: Copy to .redshank/settings.json. All fields optional — unknown keys are silently ignored.
_fetchers_comment: Per-source data fetcher configuration. Sources not listed are enabled by default.

_example_rate_limited._comment: Custom rate limit: set rate_limit_ms (ms between requests)

hibp._comment: HIBP requires paid API key — disable if you don't have one

opencorporates._comment: OpenCorporates free tier: 500 req/day. Set api_key for higher volume.

voter_reg._comment: Voter registration lookups — disable if not needed for your use case
